name: jstack
description: Team operations toolkit: project management, sprint ops, engineering metrics, incident response, knowledge management, session lifecycle, personal productivity (diary/remember/focus/9-grid-eval), JIRA CRUD with enforcement rules, Notion CRUD with templates, reports, GitHub metrics, browser workflow automation, scheduled routines, research, meetings, MCP discovery, evals, and telemetry (opt-in).

telemetry_opt_in.title: Anonymous telemetry
telemetry_opt_in.description: Send anonymous usage metrics (skill name, tokens, latency). No PII.
